title: Frontend Design Skill
description: Instruction-first secure UI/UX frontend design skill with a bundled local-only design-system generator.
writes_allowed: agent skills folder selected by the user
notes: Instruction-first skill. The installed skill folder includes bundled local-only design-system generator scripts and CSV data.
Pack installers must copy files only and must not run the generator during installation.
DESIGN.md support is documentation-only by default; installers must not run upstream Google CLI or package tooling.
Read-only local generator execution may support normal design creation or revision only from the trusted installed skill path; generated output writes require explicit current-turn approval.
